findings.quote: Fog-nets keep planted trees alive mainly where coastal fog is already reliable.
findings.note: Main-idea item: A/B/D are sweeping absolutes (proven, almost any / finally at scale / surest defense) while C is the sole hedged option, so a no-domain reader can strip the overreaching absolutes and lean C from form alone. Materially better than chance but not decided (PARTIALLY).

findings.quote: The screens would likely help little, with too little fog for them to gather.
findings.note: Stem premise (fog only occasional) logically entails D; B contradicts the premise and C is absurd, so blind reasoning eliminates two and leans D. A remains a plausible over-generalisation trap the passage must rule out (PARTIALLY).

findings.quote: The spreading crack itself, which tears open the capsules and frees the slurry.
findings.note: Microcapsule self-healing concrete is real-world knowledge; B matches the known autonomous crack-triggered mechanism and C (brushed onto the surface) contradicts self-sealing, but A (thermal) and D (moisture) are substantively plausible triggers the passage is needed to decide (WORLD_KNOWLEDGE).

findings.quote: Studiens viktigaste fynd var att bevarandet av varje enskild bildyta gick att gradera på en skala i fem steg.
findings.note: Blind one eliminates D (a grading method is not a result) and A (Allt... absolute overreach), leaving B vs C undecided. Materially better than chance but not decided (PARTIALLY).

findings.quote: Kalken släpper igenom vattenånga och binder till färgen när den härdar, så att fukten inte stängs inne bakom ytan.
findings.note: Building-conservation world knowledge (lime is vapour-permeable and carbonates) points to A; C is internally inconsistent (mörka kalklagret for a whitewash) and D is absurd, but B (impermeable seal) is a substantive competing mechanism the passage must settle (WORLD_KNOWLEDGE).

findings.quote: En gammal överkalkning tycks oavsiktligt ha bevarat medeltida måleri, men nyttan är villkorad och tolkningen omdiskuterad.
findings.note: Main-message item: C is an overreaching absolute (säkraste... borde göras överallt) and A/B are too-narrow details, so the comprehensive hedged option D is reachable by form (PARTIALLY).

findings.quote: Skillnaden inom samma kyrka kan inte bero på att vissa kyrkor var rikare eller bättre byggda, eftersom fälten delar samma byggnad.
findings.note: STRUCTURAL_LEAK / stem entailment: the stem premise (fields in the SAME church preserved differently) makes B a logically necessary truth about a controlled comparison. C and D are form-visible over-generalisations (alltid/oavsett, enbart) and A is a non-sequitur, so B is forced by pure logic with no passage and no domain knowledge.

findings.quote: Att beslutet bara väger det räknebara och förbigår värden som barnens vardagliga kontakt med maten.
findings.note: A is an absolute (aldrig) and the title itself (Vad centralköket inte kan väga) telegraphs the only-weighs-the-countable thesis, so a blind reader leans B; C and D remain substantive critiques the passage must confirm (PARTIALLY).

findings.quote: Båda orglarna byggdes av en och samme byggmästare, fast för skilda församlingar.
findings.note: The stem asks for a DIFFERENCE but D states a similarity (logical mismatch) and C is an absolute (inte längre... över huvud taget), so blind one eliminates both, leaving the A/B mirror pair at roughly 50%. Better than chance, not decided (PARTIALLY).
